title: stelis molecula
intro: Stelis molecula, also known as the orchid bee pollinated orchid, is a species of orchid that belongs to the genus Stelis. This plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Stelis molecula include the potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Stelis molecula are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts that are used to harness its medicinal properties.
